amendment.description: An amendment numbered 5 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to direct the Secretary of Agriculture to establish a grant program to facilitate tree planting that reduces residential energy consumption, and for other purposes.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Hayes amendment (A006) Agreed to by voice vote.

action.text: House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Hayes amendment (A006) Agreed to by voice vote.
